zh.lifeSummary: Ellen Leigh Bruyn是Sir John De Bruyn的女兒，於1401年出生在英國爾阿爾 霍爾。她於1420年與Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton在英國英格蘭爾阿爾 霍爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年8月24日在她的家鄉享年108歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bruyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bruin
meanings: Dutch: from a personal name based on Middle Dutch bruun ‘brown’, or a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion. Compare De Bruin and Bruyn .
English: of uncertain origin. It may, as Reaney suggested, reflect a pronunciation of French   Brun   ‘brown’.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Lee , from an alternative spelling of the surname. As a girl's name it is frequently an element of compound names such as Abbie-Leigh, Jodie-Leigh, and Katie-Leigh.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Ellen Leigh Bruyn was born in 1401, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England as the daughter of Sir John De Bruyn. She married Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton in 1420, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 24 August 1509, in her hometown, at the age of 108.

Elle est décédée le 24 août 1509, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 108 ans.

ru.lifeSummary: Ellen Leigh Bruyn родилась в 1401 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия. Её отца звали Sir John De Bruyn. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton в 1420 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 24 августа 1509 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 108 лет.
